description: A designed graphic with a blue header bar carrying a Department of Homeland Security seal, an ICE logo and the text 'CHICAGO: Operation Midway Blitz'. The main image is a booking-style portrait of a young man with short dark hair in a white shirt photographed in an office. A blue footer bar reads 'Larceny'.
notable_text: CHICAGO: Operation Midway Blitz; ICE; U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY; Larceny
